title: terminalis dracaenoides
intro: Terminalis dracaenoides, also known as Dragon's Blood Tree or Croton Lechleri, is a plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its resin. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, including wound healing, reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health. Terminalis dracaenoides is often prepared as a tincture, decoction, or salve, and is used in herbal medicine to treat a range of conditions, including wounds, ulcers, and digestive issues.
